top_signals.title: NextEra’s Mega-Deal Heralds the Age of the Battery
top_signals.summary: The US utility is homing in on energy storage as ballooning data-center growth drives demand.

top_signals.title: Quantexa boss: ‘Britain can build global AI winners’
top_signals.summary: Vishal Marria is not short of reasons to be cheerful about Britain. At a time when the UK’s tech sector is once again debating listings, capital flight and whether founders inevitably end up scaling overseas, the Quantexa boss remains notably bullish about building and scaling in London. “Yes, we’re HQ’d in London, in the UK, [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
